title: Business Case Review and Template Guide
note: Standing governance policy defining the 7-section business case template, approval thresholds, and disposition vocabulary used consistently across every other document in this corpus.

title: Business Case: Cloud Infrastructure Migration
note: Original projections are deliberately compared against later actuals in review__cloud_migration_post_implementation_12mo.md and tracker__benefits_realization_q2_2026.md — intentional variance for RAG training, not an error.

title: Business Case: Omnichannel Point-of-Sale and Unified Commerce Platform
note: Original projections are deliberately compared against later actuals in review__pos_unified_commerce_post_implementation_6mo.md and tracker__benefits_realization_q2_2026.md — intentional variance, not an error.

title: Business Case: Customer Data Platform and AI Personalization ("Lumenpoint CDP")
note: Approved at the Q1 2026 steering committee (see minutes__steering_committee_2026_q1.md); not yet live, no PIR/tracker data exists for this initiative yet.

title: Business Case: Cybersecurity Modernization — Zero Trust Network Access ("Sentrywall ZTNA")
note: Approved at the Q1 2026 steering committee (see minutes__steering_committee_2026_q1.md); benefit figure is risk-adjusted, IRR intentionally not computed.

title: ERP Replacement Business Case: Legacy "Summit" to Ledgerline Cloud ERP
note: ORIGINAL figures only (TCO $22.5M, NPV $4.9M, IRR 19%, payback 28mo, go-live Q4 2026). Deliberately superseded by the Sept 2026 addendum after discovery-phase scope creep (14 vs. 6 legacy integrations) — an intentional versioning contradiction for RAG training, not an error. Do not reconcile the two documents' numbers.

title: Business Case: Warehouse Management System Replacement and Robotics Pilot
note: Presented to the Q3 2026 steering committee and DEFERRED to FY2027 Q2 (see minutes__steering_committee_2026_q3.md) — not rejected, distinct disposition.

title: Business Case: AI Customer Service Chatbot ("Conversant AI")
note: Presented to the Q3 2026 steering committee and REJECTED for FY2027 (see minutes__steering_committee_2026_q3.md) — distinct disposition from the WMS case's 'deferred' status.

title: ERP Finalists Evaluation Scorecard
note: Selects Ledgerline Cloud ERP over Vantage Suite ERP and Corvus ERP Cloud (flagged for vendor-viability risk); vendor names must match case__erp_replacement_cloud_migration.md and the addendum exactly.

title: WMS and Robotics Finalists Vendor Scorecard
note: Selects Kinetic Flow WMS + Orbis Robotics over Atlas WMS and Palletworks WMS+Robotics; vendor names must match case__wms_robotics_pilot.md exactly.

title: Tech Investment Steering Committee — Minutes, Q1 2026 Meeting
note: Records approval of the Cybersecurity and CDP business cases.

title: Tech Investment Steering Committee — Minutes, Q3 2026 Meeting
note: Records the ERP scope-creep briefing that directs the change-request addendum, the WMS deferral, the Chatbot rejection, and a Cloud Migration benefits update citing ~97% of the opex-savings target — a later, higher data point than the tracker (95%, Jul 2026) and PIR (92%, Jan 2026); intentional temporal progression, not a discrepancy.

title: Memorandum: FY2027 Technology Capital Allocation and Portfolio Prioritization
note: Ranks and cross-references all 7 business cases in one place; good anchor for compare-across-cases questions.

title: Post-Implementation Review: Cloud Infrastructure Migration (12-Month)
note: Reports downtime OVERPERFORMANCE and opex-savings SHORTFALL (92% of target) vs. case__cloud_infrastructure_migration.md's original projections — intentional, deliberate variance. See tracker__benefits_realization_q2_2026.md (95%) and minutes__steering_committee_2026_q3.md (~97%) for the same metric at later dates.

title: Post-Implementation Review: Omnichannel POS and Unified Commerce Platform (6-Month)
note: Reports checkout-time OVERPERFORMANCE and omnichannel revenue-lift SHORTFALL (~58% of ramp pace, root-caused to training-completion gaps) vs. case__omnichannel_pos_unified_commerce.md's original projections — intentional. See tracker__benefits_realization_q2_2026.md (~63% of pace) for a later data point.

title: Internal Audit Memorandum: Technology Investment Portfolio Risk Review
note: Pre-warns on ERP data-migration risk months before the Sept 2026 scope-creep discovery documented in the addendum — intentional foreshadowing, not a contradiction.

title: ERP Replacement Change Request Addendum: Revised Scope, Budget, and Timeline
note: REVISED figures only (TCO $27.8M, NPV $2.1M, IRR 12%, payback 34mo, go-live Q2 2027). Deliberately contradicts the original case's numbers after discovery of 14 vs. 6 scoped legacy integrations — intentional versioning exercise for RAG training, not an error.

title: Financial Methodology Reference
note: Defines NPV/IRR/payback/TCO methodology company-wide; illustrative examples use invented figures unrelated to any of the 7 live business cases.

title: Portfolio Benefits Realization Tracker — Q2 2026
note: Portfolio-wide snapshot; Cloud Migration (95% of opex target) and POS (~63% of revenue-lift pace) figures intentionally differ from their respective PIRs (92%, 58%) and the later Q3 2026 minutes (~97%) — a deliberate temporal-reconciliation exercise, not a data error.
